roadmap.summary: Start with arrays and strings, progress through recursion, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, and dynamic programming. Includes complexity analysis and STL usage.

intro.description: Data Science is the field of extracting meaningful insights from data using statistics, programming, and domain expertise. It helps in decision-making across industries like business, healthcare, and government.

roadmap.summary: Covers foundational math, data handling, machine learning, deep learning, NLP, computer vision, tools, and portfolio projects. Includes Python/R, libraries like NumPy, Pandas, TensorFlow, and visualization tools like Power BI and Tableau.

books.title: Data Science and Machine Learning: Mathematical & Statistical Methods

paid.title: PW Skills – Data Science with Generative AI

intro.description: Cybersecurity is the practice of protecting systems, networks, and data from digital attacks. It involves firewalls, encryption, antivirus tools, and ethical practices to defend against threats like hacking, ransomware, and data breaches.

roadmap.summary: Covers foundational topics like programming, operating systems, probability, and cybersecurity concepts. Reinforces basics with ethics, vulnerabilities, and network security. Advances into cloud, encryption, endpoint security, threat intelligence, and digital forensics. Includes certifications and hands-on projects like CTFs and bug bounty.

free.title: The Cyber Security Body Of Knowledge (CyBOK)
Cybersecurity Handbook – Greek National Cybersecurity Authority
Cybersecurity Roadmap for Beginners – Meera Tamboli

intro.description: Android development focuses on building mobile applications for Android devices using Java or Kotlin.

roadmap.summary: Covers Java/Kotlin, Android Studio, UI/UX, activity lifecycle, Firebase, and publishing apps.

Swift Programming: The Big Nerd Ranch Guide

intro.description: AWS (Amazon Web Services) is the world’s most comprehensive cloud platform offering over 200 services including computing, storage, databases, machine learning, and analytics.

roadmap.summary: Covers EC2, S3, IAM, Lambda, CloudFormation, networking, DevOps, security, and certification paths like Cloud Practitioner and Solutions Architect.

books.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect Study Guide

intro.description: Microsoft Azure is a cloud computing platform offering services like virtual machines, databases, AI, and analytics across a global network of Microsoft-managed data centers.

roadmap.summary: Covers Azure fundamentals, virtual machines, storage, networking, Azure AD, DevOps, and certifications like AZ-900 and Azure Developer Associate.

books.title: Exam Ref AZ-900 Microsoft Azure Fundamentals

intro.description: Google Cloud Platform (GCP) provides scalable cloud services for computing, storage, machine learning, and data analytics, integrated with Google’s global infrastructure.

roadmap.summary: Covers Compute Engine, App Engine, BigQuery, Cloud Storage, Kubernetes, IAM, and certifications like Associate Cloud Engineer and Professional Data Engineer.

books.title: Data Science on the Google Cloud Platform

free.title: Free Google Cloud Courses – Great Learning

intro.description: DevOps is a set of practices that combines software development (Dev) and IT operations (Ops) to shorten the system development lifecycle and provide continuous delivery with high software quality. It focuses on communication, collaboration, integration, and automation using various tools.

roadmap.summary: The DevOps roadmap focuses on Linux Fundamentals and Scripting (Bash/Python), Version Control (Git), CI/CD concepts and tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI), Infrastructure as Code (IaC) (e.g., Terraform, Ansible), Containerization (Docker) and Orchestration (Kubernetes), Cloud Platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP), and Monitoring/Logging/Observability (e.g., Prometheus, ELK Stack).

books.title: The Phoenix Project: A Novel about IT, DevOps, and Helping Your Business Win
The DevOps Handbook: How to Create World-Class Agility, Reliability, and Security in Technology Organizations
Continuous Delivery: Reliable Software Releases through Build, Test, and Deployment Automation
Automate the Boring Stuff with Python

free.title: Introduction to JSON for new DevOps engineers!

intro.description: Block Chain is a decentralized, distributed ledger technology (DLT) that securely records transactions across many computers (nodes) in an immutable sequence of blocks. It enables trustless systems like cryptocurrencies (Bitcoin, Ethereum), smart contracts, and decentralized finance (DeFi).

roadmap.summary: A comprehensive roadmap covers: Foundational Cryptography (Hashing, Asymmetric Encryption), Core Concepts (Consensus Mechanisms - PoW/PoS, DLT, Blocks, Transactions), Smart Contract Development (Solidity/Rust), dApp Development (Web3.js, Ethers.js, Front-end integration), Layer 2 Solutions (Rollups), and Advanced topics (DeFi, NFTs, Security Auditing, Governance).

books.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Programming the Open Blockchain
Mastering Ethereum: Building Smart Contracts and DApps

free.title: Learn Blockchain, Solidity, and Full Stack Web3 Development

intro.description: Machine Learning (ML) is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn patterns from data and make decisions or predictions without being explicitly programmed. It powers applications like recommendation engines, fraud detection, and autonomous vehicles.

roadmap.summary: The ML roadmap includes Linear Algebra, Probability & Statistics, Python Programming, Data Preprocessing, Supervised & Unsupervised Learning, Model Evaluation, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, and Deployment. Key tools include Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and platforms like Kaggle and Google Colab.

books.title: Hands-On Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn, Keras, and TensorFlow

paid.title: Machine Learning A-Z™: Hands-On Python & R

intro.description: Web Development is the art and science of building and maintaining websites and web applications. It combines design, programming, and problem-solving to create interactive digital experiences accessible across the globe.

roadmap.summary: Covers front-end (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, frameworks), back-end (Node.js, databases, APIs), version control, testing, security, performance, architecture, and deployment. Includes MERN stack, DevOps integration, and mobile/web app optimization.

books.title: The Odin Project – Full Stack JavaScript

certified.title: IBM Full Stack Software Developer Certificate
Simplilearn Full Stack Java Developer Program

intro.description: Data Analytics is the process of inspecting, cleaning, transforming, and modeling data to discover useful information, draw conclusions, and support decision-making. It is the bridge between raw data and business intelligence, focusing on what has happened and why.

roadmap.summary: The roadmap centers on Statistical Fundamentals, Spreadsheets (Advanced Excel/Google Sheets), Database Querying (SQL), Programming (Python/R) with libraries (Pandas, NumPy, Tidyverse), Data Visualization and Business Intelligence (BI) Tools (Tableau, Power BI), and Storytelling with data. It emphasizes hands-on projects and domain knowledge.

books.title: The Elements of Data Analytic Style
A Beginner's Guide to Data & Analytics

free.title: Complete Statistics For Data Science In 6 hours
Complete Excel Tutorial in one video
Python for Data Science, AI & Development

certified.title: Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300)

intro.description: Prompt Engineering is the discipline of designing and refining input prompts for Large Language Models (LLMs) to achieve more accurate, relevant, and desired outputs. It involves understanding LLM capabilities and limitations to effectively guide their behavior for specific tasks.

roadmap.summary: The roadmap covers Foundational LLM Concepts (Tokenization, Attention Mechanism, Transformer Architecture), Prompting Techniques (Zero-shot, Few-shot, Chain-of-Thought - CoT, Tree-of-Thought - ToT, Retrieval-Augmented Generation - RAG), Tool Integration (Function Calling, Plugins), Model Evaluation Metrics (Perplexity, ROUGE, BLEU), and Safety/Ethical Hacking (Prompt Injection, Jailbreaking). Mastery requires hands-on practice with various LLM APIs.

books.title: The Art of Prompt Engineering: A Guide to Communicating with AI
Prompt Engineering for Large Language Models

free.title: Prompt Engineering in simple terms for Beginners

paid.title: Prompt Engineering with ChatGPT, Midjourney, and other LLMs

certified.title: Generative AI with Large Language Models Specialization

intro.description: The Internet of Things (IoT) connects physical devices to the internet, enabling them to collect, share, and act on data. It powers smart homes, cities, agriculture, healthcare, and industrial automation.

roadmap.summary: Includes IoT architecture, sensors, embedded systems, communication protocols (MQTT, HTTP, CoAP), microcontrollers (Arduino, ESP32, Raspberry Pi), IoT cloud services (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), edge computing, and IoT security.

books.title: Getting Started with the Internet of Things

intro.description: Big Data refers to extremely large data sets that may be analyzed computationally to reveal patterns, trends, and associations, especially relating to human behavior and interactions. It is characterized by the 5 Vs: Volume, Velocity, Variety, Veracity, and Value.

roadmap.summary: The path to Big Data expertise focuses on Distributed Systems and Cloud Platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP), Data Warehousing/Lakes, NoSQL Databases (MongoDB, Cassandra), Programming (Python/Scala/Java), and key frameworks: Apache Hadoop (HDFS, MapReduce), Apache Spark (for fast processing), Apache Kafka (for real-time streaming), and Data Orchestration (e.g., Airflow).

books.title: Big Data: Principles and Best Practices of Scalable Real-Time Data and Stream Analytics

paid.title: Big Data Analytics with Spark and Hadoop

certified.title: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203)

intro.description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a branch of computer science focused on building smart machines capable of performing tasks that typically require human intelligence, such as learning, problem-solving, and perception.

roadmap.summary: Covers foundational concepts like search algorithms and knowledge representation, progresses to machine learning and deep learning (including neural networks, CNNs for computer vision, and sequence models for NLP), and includes practical application and societal implications.

free.title: CS50's Introduction to AI with Python
